title: Mixtral 8x22B Released
description: Mistral AI released Mixtral 8x22B, the largest and most capable open-source MoE model to date. With 141B total parameters (39B active per token), it outperformed GPT-3.5 Turbo, Grok-1, and Llama 2 70B across most benchmarks. The model achieved strong performance on multilingual tasks, math, and coding while maintaining efficient inference through sparse activation.
